attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
WBT.BK_WEB_ORDER_ID               ,
WBT.BK_QUOTE_NUM                  ,
WBT.CISCO_CREATED_FLG             ,
WBT.DSV_EVENT_CD                  ,
WBT.CUST_REQUESTED_SHIP_DTM       ,
WBT.DV_CUST_REQUESTED_SHIP_DT     ,
WBT.CHANGE_IDENTIFIER_TXT         ,
WBT.EXPIRATION_DT                 ,
WBT.EXTENDED_EXPIRATION_DT        ,
WBT.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT     ,
WBT.DISTI_TO_RESELLER_SO_NUMBER   ,
WBT.DISTI_SO_LINE_NUMBER          ,
WBT.DISTI_2_DISTI_TRX_FLAG        ,
WBT.DISTRIBUTOR_REPORTED_DEAL_ID  ,
WBT.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE      ,
WBT.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT     ,
WBT.BK_SHIP_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY  ,
WBT.BK_BILL_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY  ,
WBT.BK_END_USER_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY ,
WBT.BK_SOLD_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY  ,
WBT.BK_LOCAL_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE    ,
WBT.BK_DEAL_ID                    ,
WBT.BATCH_ID_INT                  ,
WBT.DROP_SHIP_FLAG                ,
WBT.DISTI_RPTD_COST_UNIT_PRICE_AMT,
WBT.OFFICIAL_SALE_FLAG            ,
WBT.RU_RET_ORIG_BS_LST_U_PRICE_AMT,
WBT.RU_RET_ORIG_CST_U_PRICE_AMT   ,
WBT.PROFESSIONAL_SERVICE_AMOUNT   ,
WBT.RPTD_EXTENDED_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT ,
WBT.RPTD_NET_UNIT_PRICE_USD_AMT   ,
WBT.RPTD_UNIT_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT    ,
WBT.RPTD_UNIT_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT     ,
WBT.PRODUCT_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT      ,
WBT.PRODUCT_KEY                   ,
WBT.POS_TRX_LINE_PRODUCT_QUANT    ,
WBT.POS_TRX_LINE_POSTED_DATE      ,
WBT.POS_TRX_LINE_ACTIVE_FLAG      ,
WBT.TRANSACTION_DATE              ,
WBT.RU_RSLR_TO_DISTI_PO_NUMBER    ,
WBT.VLDTD_NET_UNIT_PRICE_USD_AMT  ,
WBT.VLDTD_NET_UNIT_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,
WBT.VALUATION_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT    ,
WBT.VALUATION_PRICE_LOCAL_AMOUNT  ,
WBT.DISTRIBUTOR_WAREHOUSE_NUMBER  ,
WBT.PROMOTION_NAME                ,
PSPK.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY        ,
WBT.ELIG_FOR_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE ,   
WBT.DSTRBTR_RSLR_SALES_ORDER_DT,
WBT.LAST_SOURCE_UPDATE_DTM,
WBT.BASE_LIST_UNIT_PROD_PRICE_AMT,
WBT.SERVICE_TYPE_CD,
WBT.SERVICE_BOOKING_TYPE_CD,
WBT.SERVICE_BKG_DUR_MTHS_CNT,
WBT.CISCO_BOOKED_FLG,
WBT.PARENT_POS_TRX_ID_INT,
WBT.BK_TOP_BKGS_POS_TRX_ID_INT,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER ,              
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER  ,             
Current_Timestamp(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM  ,              
Current_Timestamp(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM ,   
WBT.LINE_STATUS_CD      ,
WBT.PROMOTION_NUM,
WBT.RU_BK_ORIG_POS_TRANSACTION_ID,
WBT.RU_RET_ORIG_DISTI_SO_NUM,
WBT.RU_RET_ORIG_DISTI2RSLR_INV_NUM,
WBT.RU_RET_ORIG_DISTI_INV_NUM,
WBT.ACTION_CODE,                  
WBT.DML_TYPE,
/* Modified as part of SFP Rel : Respective TV ETL, wf_W_BKG_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE_TV failing frequently in TS3 due to data issue */
CASE WHEN EL.BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT IS NOT NULL THEN 
	EL.DV_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM
ELSE 
	COALESCE(NSOLNRT.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM,  CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))
END	AS RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM,
CASE WHEN EL.BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT IS NOT NULL THEN 
	EL.DV_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM
ELSE
	COALESCE(NSOLNRT.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM,  CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))
END	AS RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM,
/* Added as part of CG1 MARCH Rel */
CASE WHEN EL.BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT IS NOT NULL THEN 
	ROUND(MONTHS_BETWEEN(DV_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM,DV_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM))
ELSE
CASE WHEN IS_SERVICE_CONTRACT_POS_FLG = 'Y' THEN 
case when COALESCE(WBT.SERVICE_PERIOD,'MO') IN 'DAY' THEN  (COALESCE(WBT.DURATION,0.000000)/365.00)*12.00 /*To convert days to months*/
            when COALESCE(WBT.SERVICE_PERIOD,'MO') IN 'YR' THEN  (COALESCE(WBT.DURATION,0.000000))*12.00 /*To convert years to months*/
            ELSE COALESCE(WBT.DURATION,0.000000) END
ELSE
Coalesce(NSOLNRT.RU_SRVC_CNTRCT_DRTN_MNTHS_CNT,-999.000000) END
END  AS RU_SRVC_CNTRCT_DRTN_MNTHS_CNT,
/* Added as part of SFP  Rel */
WBT.MAGIC_KEY AS MAGIC_KEY_ID,
WBT.NET_PRICE_FLAG AS NET_PRICE_FLG,
'N' AS IS_SERVICE_CONTRACT_POS_FLG,
/* Added as part of ACV FY21 */
CASE WHEN NP_BPC.ACV_FLG='Y' THEN 'ACV' ELSE 'TCV' END AS BOOKINGS_POLICY_CD,
WBT.REVENUE_SOURCE_CODE, /*Added as part of SFP Rel - OCT*/
COALESCE(WBT.GPL_PRICE,0) AS GLOB_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT, /*added as part of FLEXI_AUG_REL rampusul */
COALESCE(WBT.GPL_PRICE_LC,0) AS GLOB_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,   /*added as part of FLEXI_AUG_REL rampusul */
WBT.CHANGE_REASON_DESC, /*added as part of MBR DSV cancellation reason changes*/
 /* added below columns as part of AI Bookings Scope */
CASE WHEN WBT.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD IN ('AI_DEDICATED','AI_CAPABLE_INTENT_YES') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS TRANSACTION_AI_FLG,
WBT.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD,
WBT.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME,
WBT.AI_STRATEGIC_FACTOR_PCT  /*MVP4 AI BOOKINGS */
FROM $$STGDB.WI_BKG_TRANS WBT
INNER JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_DSV_TRANSACTION_LINE_PSPK  PSPK
ON WBT.BK_SOLD_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY=PSPK.BK_SOLD_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY
AND WBT.BK_END_USER_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY=PSPK.BK_END_USER_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRX_LN_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_TV 
WHERE DSV_BOOKINGS_FLG='Y' AND END_TV_DTM='3500-01-01 00:00:00' GROUP BY 1 ,2)NPTLR
ON NPTLR.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT=WBT.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
ON NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NPTLR.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_NRT NSOLNRT
-----ON NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT=NSOLNRT.SK_SALES_ORDER_LINE_ID_INT
ON case when NSOL.SS_CODE='CG' then NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT else NSOL.sk_opl_line_id_int end =case when NSOLNRT.SS_CD='CG' then NSOLNRT.SK_SALES_ORDER_LINE_ID_INT
else NSOLNRT.SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT end
AND NSOL.SS_CODE = NSOLNRT.SS_CD
/* Added as part of ACV FY21 */
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT_TV NP_BPC
ON WBT.PRODUCT_KEY=NP_BPC.ITEM_KEY
AND WBT.POS_TRX_LINE_POSTED_DATE BETWEEN NP_BPC.START_TV_DATE AND NP_BPC.END_TV_DATE
/* Added as part of POS IB*/
LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_POS_ATR_FIX EL
ON EL.BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT = WBT.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
/* Added as part of SFP Rel */
WHERE WBT.NET_PRICE_FLAG <>'Y'

UNION ALL

/* Added new Union as part of SFP Rel : SFP & Non-SFP segregation */
SELECT
WBT.BK_WEB_ORDER_ID               ,
WBT.BK_QUOTE_NUM                  ,
WBT.CISCO_CREATED_FLG             ,
WBT.DSV_EVENT_CD                  ,
WBT.CUST_REQUESTED_SHIP_DTM       ,
WBT.DV_CUST_REQUESTED_SHIP_DT     ,
WBT.CHANGE_IDENTIFIER_TXT         ,
WBT.EXPIRATION_DT                 ,
WBT.EXTENDED_EXPIRATION_DT        ,
WBT.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT     ,
WBT.DISTI_TO_RESELLER_SO_NUMBER   ,
WBT.DISTI_SO_LINE_NUMBER          ,
WBT.DISTI_2_DISTI_TRX_FLAG        ,
WBT.DISTRIBUTOR_REPORTED_DEAL_ID  ,
WBT.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE      ,
WBT.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT     ,
WBT.BK_SHIP_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY  ,
WBT.BK_BILL_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY  ,
WBT.BK_END_USER_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY ,
WBT.BK_SOLD_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY  ,
WBT.BK_LOCAL_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE    ,
WBT.BK_DEAL_ID                    ,
WBT.BATCH_ID_INT                  ,
WBT.DROP_SHIP_FLAG                ,
WBT.DISTI_RPTD_COST_UNIT_PRICE_AMT,
WBT.OFFICIAL_SALE_FLAG            ,
WBT.RU_RET_ORIG_BS_LST_U_PRICE_AMT,
WBT.RU_RET_ORIG_CST_U_PRICE_AMT   ,
WBT.PROFESSIONAL_SERVICE_AMOUNT   ,
WBT.RPTD_EXTENDED_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT ,
WBT.RPTD_NET_UNIT_PRICE_USD_AMT   ,
WBT.RPTD_UNIT_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT    ,
WBT.RPTD_UNIT_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT     ,
WBT.PRODUCT_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT      ,
WBT.PRODUCT_KEY                   ,
WBT.POS_TRX_LINE_PRODUCT_QUANT    ,
WBT.POS_TRX_LINE_POSTED_DATE      ,
WBT.POS_TRX_LINE_ACTIVE_FLAG      ,
WBT.TRANSACTION_DATE              ,
WBT.RU_RSLR_TO_DISTI_PO_NUMBER    ,
WBT.VLDTD_NET_UNIT_PRICE_USD_AMT  ,
WBT.VLDTD_NET_UNIT_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,
WBT.VALUATION_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT    ,
WBT.VALUATION_PRICE_LOCAL_AMOUNT  ,
WBT.DISTRIBUTOR_WAREHOUSE_NUMBER  ,
WBT.PROMOTION_NAME                ,
PSPK.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY        ,
WBT.ELIG_FOR_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE ,   
WBT.DSTRBTR_RSLR_SALES_ORDER_DT,
WBT.LAST_SOURCE_UPDATE_DTM,
WBT.BASE_LIST_UNIT_PROD_PRICE_AMT,
WBT.SERVICE_TYPE_CD,
WBT.SERVICE_BOOKING_TYPE_CD,
WBT.SERVICE_BKG_DUR_MTHS_CNT,
WBT.CISCO_BOOKED_FLG,
WBT.PARENT_POS_TRX_ID_INT,
WBT.BK_TOP_BKGS_POS_TRX_ID_INT,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER ,              
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER  ,             
Current_Timestamp(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM  ,              
Current_Timestamp(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM ,   
WBT.LINE_STATUS_CD      ,
WBT.PROMOTION_NUM,
WBT.RU_BK_ORIG_POS_TRANSACTION_ID,
WBT.RU_RET_ORIG_DISTI_SO_NUM,
WBT.RU_RET_ORIG_DISTI2RSLR_INV_NUM,
WBT.RU_RET_ORIG_DISTI_INV_NUM,
WBT.ACTION_CODE,                  
WBT.DML_TYPE,                     
/* Modified as part of SFP  Rel */

CASE WHEN EL.BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT IS NOT NULL THEN 
	EL.DV_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM
ELSE 
Coalesce(CASE WHEN IS_SERVICE_CONTRACT_POS_FLG = 'Y' THEN WBT.START_DATE ELSE NSOLNRT.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM END, Cast('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))
END  AS RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM,

CASE WHEN EL.BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT IS NOT NULL THEN 
	EL.DV_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM
ELSE
Coalesce(CASE WHEN IS_SERVICE_CONTRACT_POS_FLG = 'Y' THEN WBT.END_DATE ELSE NSOLNRT.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM END, Cast('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))
END  AS RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM,
/* Added as part of CG1 MARCH Rel */
CASE WHEN EL.BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT IS NOT NULL THEN 
	ROUND(MONTHS_BETWEEN(DV_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM,DV_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM))
ELSE
CASE WHEN IS_SERVICE_CONTRACT_POS_FLG = 'Y' THEN 
case when COALESCE(WBT.SERVICE_PERIOD,'MO') IN 'DAY' THEN  (COALESCE(WBT.DURATION,0.000000)/365.00)*12.00 /*To convert days to months*/
            when COALESCE(WBT.SERVICE_PERIOD,'MO') IN 'YR' THEN  (COALESCE(WBT.DURATION,0.000000))*12.00 /*To convert years to months*/
            ELSE COALESCE(WBT.DURATION,0.000000) END
ELSE
Coalesce(NSOLNRT.RU_SRVC_CNTRCT_DRTN_MNTHS_CNT,-999.000000) END
END  AS RU_SRVC_CNTRCT_DRTN_MNTHS_CNT,
/* Added as part of SFP Rel */
WBT.MAGIC_KEY AS MAGIC_KEY_ID,
WBT.NET_PRICE_FLAG AS NET_PRICE_FLG,
CASE WHEN Coalesce(NSOLNRT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,-7777) NOT IN (-6666,-7777)  AND 
          ( Coalesce(NSOLNRT.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM, Cast('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) <> Cast('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)) 
          OR Coalesce(NSOLNRT.RU_SRVC_CNTRCT_DRTN_MNTHS_CNT,-999) NOT IN (-999,0) )  
    THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS IS_SERVICE_CONTRACT_POS_FLG,
	/* Added as part of ACV FY21 */
CASE WHEN NP_BPC.ACV_FLG='Y' THEN 'ACV' ELSE 'TCV' END AS BOOKINGS_POLICY_CD,
WBT.REVENUE_SOURCE_CODE,/*Added as part of SFP Rel - OCT*/
COALESCE(WBT.GPL_PRICE,0) AS GLOB_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT,  /*added as part of FLEXI_AUG_REL rampusul */
COALESCE(WBT.GPL_PRICE_LC,0) AS GLOB_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,  /*added as part of FLEXI_AUG_REL rampusul */
WBT.CHANGE_REASON_DESC, /*added as part of MBR DSV cancellation reason changes*/
 /* added below columns as part of AI Bookings Scope */
CASE WHEN WBT.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD IN ('AI_DEDICATED','AI_CAPABLE_INTENT_YES') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS TRANSACTION_AI_FLG,
WBT.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD,
WBT.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME,
WBT.AI_STRATEGIC_FACTOR_PCT  /*MVP4 AI BOOKINGS */
FROM $$STGDB.WI_BKG_TRANS WBT
INNER JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_DSV_TRANSACTION_LINE_PSPK  PSPK
ON WBT.BK_SOLD_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY=PSPK.BK_SOLD_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY
AND WBT.BK_END_USER_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY=PSPK.BK_END_USER_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRX_LN_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_TV 
WHERE DSV_BOOKINGS_FLG='Y' AND END_TV_DTM='3500-01-01 00:00:00' GROUP BY 1 ,2)NPTLR
ON NPTLR.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT=WBT.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
ON NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NPTLR.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_NRT NSOLNRT
-----ON NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT=NSOLNRT.SK_SALES_ORDER_LINE_ID_INT
ON case when NSOL.SS_CODE='CG' then NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT else NSOL.sk_opl_line_id_int end =case when NSOLNRT.SS_CD='CG' then NSOLNRT.SK_SALES_ORDER_LINE_ID_INT
else NSOLNRT.SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT end
AND NSOL.SS_CODE = NSOLNRT.SS_CD
/* Added as part of ACV FY21 */
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT_TV NP_BPC
ON WBT.PRODUCT_KEY=NP_BPC.ITEM_KEY
AND WBT.POS_TRX_LINE_POSTED_DATE BETWEEN NP_BPC.START_TV_DATE AND NP_BPC.END_TV_DATE
LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_POS_ATR_FIX EL
ON EL.BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT = WBT.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
/* Added as part of SFP Rel */
 WHERE WBT.NET_PRICE_FLAG = 'Y'
